subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto Him Who hath, through His power, attained unto unity, and Who, in His might and grandeur, standeth alone, He unto Whose exaltation all created things bear witness [3.5s]... ...In connection with the demands for payment of which thou hast written in thy letter, it is manifestly clear that anyone who hath the ability to settle his debts
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی توحد بالقدره و تفرد بالعزه و العظمه الذی شهدت الاشیاء بعلوه و
subcodes.subjects: @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @station of the Manifestation of God, @suffering and imprisonment, @honesty; truthfulness; trustworthiness, @transcendence; unknowability of God
